sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97458" key="suagresi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῠαγρ-εσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n97458.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boar-hunt,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.34</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Rhian.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
